title: lochemia supina
intro: Lochemia supina, also known as creeping knawel or wild cress, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, sore throats, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and kill bacteria. Lochemia supina can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to make the most of its medicinal and health benefits.
